void __cdecl FUN_00456250(int *param_1)

{
  int iVar1;
  _SYSTEMTIME local_10;
  
  GetLocalTime(&local_10);
  iVar1 = FUN_0045a200(local_10._0_4_ & 0xffff,(uint)local_10._0_4_ >> 0x10,(uint)local_10.wDay,
